name: Chakra UI best practices
description: Production practices for Chakra: structure, composition, responsive props, theming/dark mode, a11y discipline, and when to avoid Chakra.

metadata.intent: Build scalable Chakra UI apps with consistent patterns and predictable overrides

conventions: Prefer re-usable layout primitives (Box/Flex/Grid) and keep components single-responsibility.

steps.description: Structure: separate reusable UI components from domain components; keep component files focused; export via index files where helpful.
Responsive props: prefer Chakra’s array/object responsive syntax for layout and sizing; keep breakpoints consistent with theme.
Theming: centralize colors/typography/spacing in theme; prefer semantic tokens; test in light and dark modes.
Overrides: prefer style props and theme extension before writing custom CSS; keep overrides localized and predictable.
Accessibility: keep keyboard navigation and focus management correct; verify contrast; run `pi validate` for common a11y issues.
Performance: identify hotspots; avoid unnecessary prop churn; memoize where needed; if the runtime cost shows up, re-evaluate Chakra usage in the hottest paths.
